ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course (e.g., COMP, MATH) */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., Lecture, Laboratory, Seminar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number */,
  "crn" INTEGER /* Course Registration Number (CRN) */,
  "meeting_times" TEXT /* Meeting times for the section */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the section */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Location or classroom where the section meets */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes or instructions from the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours when the instructor is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section_instructors" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact for the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  "adviser_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Registered, Dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record for the student in the section */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
column_names: Subject area of the course (e.g., COMP, MATH)
Number of credits for the course
